security.changePasswordDescription: Update your password to keep your account secure.
security.signOutEverywhereDescription: Sign out of all devices and sessions. You will need to sign in again.
security.mfaDescription: Add an extra layer of security to your account using an authenticator app.
security.mfaDisableConfirm: Are you sure you want to disable two-factor authentication? This will make your account less secure.
security.mfaStep1Description: Open your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, 1Password, Authy, etc.) and scan this QR code.
security.mfaManualEntry: Can't scan? Enter this key manually:
security.mfaStep2Description: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to verify setup.
security.mfaSuccess: Two-factor authentication has been enabled successfully.
security.mfaVerifyFailed: Invalid code. Please check your authenticator app and try again.

organization.name: Organization Name
organization.billingContactHint: Invoices and billing notifications will be sent to this email address.
organization.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.

account.deleteDescription: Permanently delete your account. This action cannot be undone.
account.deleteWarning1: All your data will be permanently removed
account.deleteWarning2: You will lose access to all projects and resources
